trace.summary: Initial full-stack build of the NeighborhoodPickup Commerce Portal with role-based Vue.js frontend, Express/TypeScript backend, and MySQL persistence.
commits: 4498dcf — Initial commit: full project scaffold with backend (Express/TypeScript), frontend (Vue 3/Pinia), Docker Compose, MySQL migrations, and all feature modules.
a371004 — fixing some bugs: leader repository/route fixes, frontend checkout integration test, router guards test, vitest config updates.

b389540 — chore: update delivery audits, auth flow fixes, and test coverage: CSRF origin guard fix, commerce route refactor, login page UX, route guard improvements, appeal/notification/e2e tests, style polish, metadata update.
changes: Scaffolded monorepo with backend/, frontend/, docker-compose.yml, and MySQL migration scripts for all domain tables (users, roles, buying_cycles, listings, pickup_points, orders, comments, discussions, appeals, audit_logs, behavior_events, finance).

Built Express backend with feature-slice architecture: auth (Argon2 hashing, session tokens, lockout), commerce (cycles, listings, pickup points, favorites), orders (pricing engine, checkout with capacity conflict handling), discussions (threaded comments, mentions, notifications, flagging), appeals (structured submission, file upload with checksum, status transitions), finance (commissions, withdrawals, blacklist, CSV reconciliation export), leaders (onboarding, admin review), audit (hash-chained logs), behavior (telemetry ingestion, retention).

Built Vue 3 frontend with role-based routing and Pinia stores: LoginPage, MemberHomePage, GroupLeaderHomePage (onboarding + dashboard + withdrawal), ReviewerHomePage, FinanceClerkHomePage, AdministratorHomePage (leader approval + commission eligibility), ActiveCyclesPage, ListingsPage, PickupPointDetailPage, CheckoutPage (capacity conflict UX), OrderDetailPage, DiscussionThreadPage, NotificationCenterPage, AppealDraftPage, AppealStatusPage, FinanceDashboardPage, AdminWithdrawalBlacklistPage.
Implemented RBAC middleware (requireAuth, requireRoles), CSRF origin guard, session authentication middleware, and data encryption at rest (AES-256) for sensitive fields.
Created pricing rule engine with tiered/capped discounts, member pricing, subsidies, configurable tax jurisdictions, and full line-item tracing.

Added backend test suite: auth service/routes, password policy, RBAC middleware, CSRF guard, checkout service, pricing engine, discussion service/repository, appeal service/repository, finance service/routes, behavior service/repository, audit service, leader service, OpenAPI contract, order/leader authorization matrix.

Added frontend test suite: router guards, API client, checkout page integration, appeal draft states, notification center states, discussion thread access, e2e smoke flow, finance API, track event telemetry.
Configured Docker Compose with MySQL healthcheck, backend healthcheck, Nginx frontend, and a test runner service profile.
